fixesApplied.description: Added type guard to PostSelectorSortable onChange handler
fixesApplied.changeApplied: Replaced direct value assignment with Array.isArray(value) ? value : (value ? [value] : []) pattern
fixesApplied.rationale: PostSelectorSortable onChange returns number | number[], but selectedPosts attribute is typed as number[]. The type guard safely coerces the value into an array format.
